name: Q&A Response API
summary: Backend API for submitting user answers to agent questions and resuming execution
goals: Accept user responses to agent questions and resume agent execution
Persist Q&A exchanges in the conversation history

specDetail.description: Exposes POST /api/agents/sessions/:sessionId/qa-response endpoint that accepts a user's answer to an agent question, stores it in the conversation history, and signals the agent to resume execution.

parameters.name: questionId
parameters.description: ID of the question being answered (required)

parameters.name: optionIndex
parameters.description: Selected option index if answering from predefined options (optional)

constraints: Must validate that the question is still pending (not already answered)
Must resume agent execution within 500ms of receiving the answer
Must store the Q&A exchange in conversation history for reference

acceptanceCriteria.when: POST /api/agents/sessions/:sessionId/qa-response is called with an answer
acceptanceCriteria.then: the answer is stored and the agent resumes execution with the provided context

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
